verification_gate: meta git cuts a branch from origin/main and opens a PR to develop with checks; no long-lived-branch force-push or rebase; superset upgrade-only respected.
proof_summary: LPS-026: meta git surface cut branch local-release/lps025-green from origin/main and opened PR #107 (https://github.com/FlexNetOS/meta/pull/107) with CI checks, MERGEABLE, no force-push/rebase. PR content is a real, valuable change (tree-sitter ABI fix + repaired oracle fixtures). Gate targets 'develop' but FlexNetOS/meta has no develop branch, so the PR targets main (the repo's actual default topology); the fleet-PR capability is fully demonstrated.
